summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing for Smart Schedule Planner iteration 2 features: Exam.subject_ids multi-select, Task.exam_id linking, and /api/platforms CRUD. All 51 backend tests pass (18 new + 33 existing). All frontend features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test_session_creator_001 (creator profile) for testing. Updated test_session_C_001 to creator profile for isolation tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test users: test_session_A_001 (student), test_session_B_001 (freelancer), test_session_creator_001 (creator), test_session_C_001 (creator for isolation). All new features working: Exam.subject_ids multi-select, Task.exam_id linking, /api/platforms CRUD with 409 duplicate handling, user isolation for platforms.

backend_new_features: POST /api/exams with subject_ids array creates exam with multiple subjects
POST /api/exams without subject_ids defaults to empty array
POST /api/tasks with exam_id links task to exam
Platform user isolation - platforms created by user A not visible to user B
Delete only own platform - user can only delete their own platforms
frontend_student: Exams page: 'New exam' dialog shows checkbox list of subjects (multi-select)
Exams page: Selecting multiple subjects saves successfully
Exams page: Exam cards display all linked subject pills with colors
Task dialog: Shows 'Link to exam' selector for student profile
Task dialog: Exam dropdown lists all exams with name+date
frontend_creator: Content page: 'Platforms' button opens manage-platforms dialog
Content page: Empty state shows '+ Add your first platform' CTA
Platforms dialog: User can add platform via text input with color picker
Platforms dialog: User can add platform via 'Quick add' suggestion chips
Platforms dialog: User can remove platform via X on chip
Platforms dialog: Duplicate platform shows 'Already exists' error toast
Content page: New platforms immediately appear as filter tabs
Content page: Task dialog 'Platform' dropdown shows only user-added platforms
Content page: Scheduling a post with custom platform works
Content page: Post shows under the right filter tab
Ideas page: Platform dropdown shows user-added platforms only
Ideas page: If no platforms, shows disabled 'Add platforms in Content first' item
User isolation: Platforms created by creator A not visible to creator C
